title: Vasuuli (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vasuuli''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Vasuuli system/Legends|Vasuuli system]]''', a [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]
*The '''[[Vasuuli relay station]]''', a communications center operated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]

{{Disambig}}
